experience.description:
Built and deployed 5 REST APIs using FastAPI reducing response time by 35%
Automated CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions and Docker cutting deployment time by 60%

projects.name: IntelliHire – AI Placement Trainer
projects.description: Full-stack AI-powered placement prep platform using Python, FastAPI, LangChain, and React

response_415.message: Unsupported file type: 'xlsx'. Allowed: PDF, DOCX

body.job_description: We are hiring a Senior Software Engineer with 3+ years Python/FastAPI experience. Must have: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, PostgreSQL, Redis. Nice to have: machine learning, LangChain, LLM. Strong problem solving and CI/CD experience required.

score_breakdown.explanation: Found 18 of 25 JD keywords in resume. Score: 72%. Missing top terms: kubernetes, langchain, machine learning.
Work experience semantic match with JD: 85%.
Resume structure quality: 90%. Based on contact info, length, bullet points, and date presence.
Flesch readability score: 100%. Optimal range is clear, concise professional English.
Expected sections present: 83%. Expected: skills, experience, education, projects, summary, certifications.

improvement_suggestions: Add a professional summary targeting the Senior Software Engineer role at Google.
Include 'Kubernetes' explicitly in your experience section — you likely used it but haven't mentioned it.
Add 'machine learning' and 'LangChain' to your skills if you have any exposure.
Quantify the scale of your API work: e.g., 'serving 100k daily requests' instead of just 'deployed APIs'.
Add a Projects section showcasing ML or LLM work to match the 'nice to have' requirements.
Include any monitoring tools used (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog) — common at Google-scale.
Add a professional summary section (currently missing) — critical for ATS parsers.
Mention Agile/Scrum methodologies if used — often implicit requirements at large tech companies.

enhanced_bullets.original: Built and deployed 5 REST APIs using FastAPI reducing response time by 35%
enhanced_bullets.enhanced: Architected and shipped 5 high-performance FastAPI REST APIs, reducing average response latency by 35% and supporting 50k daily active users.

enhanced_bullets.original: Automated CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions and Docker cutting deployment time by 60%
enhanced_bullets.enhanced: Engineered end-to-end CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions and Docker, cutting deployment cycle from 45 minutes to 18 minutes (60% reduction) across 3 production services.
